name: James M.
text: Sosa saved my laptop! I thought it was completely dead and was ready to buy a new one. He explained exactly what was wrong and had it fixed in two days. Works better than before. Highly recommend!

name: Maria G.
text: Wow, what a difference! My PC feels brand new. Sosa was professional, fast, and explained everything clearly. Boots in seconds now. Will definitely come back for any future repairs.
